options.name: -min_stage_count_hold
options.description: During Hold analysis, apply this AOCV stage count floor so that all instance are guaranteed to have a stage depth no less than this value. A value of '0' will remove the assertion.

options.name: -min_stage_count_setup
options.description: During Setup analysis, apply this AOCV stage count floor so that all instance are guaranteed to have a stage depth no less than this value. A value of '0' will remove the assertion.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Remove/set to default all of the AOCV threshold assertions for specified views.

options.name: -slack_pruning_threshold
options.description: In two-pass/slack-based AOCV analysis mode, this option can be set per view to control the slack threshold at which paths are removed from consideration for the next phase of AOCV stage counting.

options.name: -view
options.description: Apply the specified thresholds to the list of analysis views.
